title: Cure and corn product in a meat processing premises
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Cure and corn product in a meat processing premises demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Identify work instructions and specifications for meat corning equipment and clarify where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work instructions and specifications for meat corning equipment and clarify where required?

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow start-up procedures to ensure machinery is in working order.
